name: RYOHIN KEIKAKU CO.
summary: Ryohin Keikaku Co., Ltd., operating as MUJI, is a Japanese retail company which sells a wide variety of household and consumer goods. MUJI is distinguished by its design minimalism, emphasis on recycling, avoidance of waste in production and packaging, and no-logo or "no-brand" policy. The company is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
